body:
### Auto tool parser no longer defaulting **High Severity** Auto-detection for `tool_call_parser` no longer runs when `inference.model.tool_call_parser` is unset (`None`); it only runs when explicitly set to `"auto"`. This changes the previous “omit to infer” behavior and can silently disable tool parsing and `enable_auto_tool_choice` for models that relied on the default inference-by-name behavior.
Additional Locations (1) - [`src/prime_rl/inference/vllm/server.py#L105-L113`](https://github.com/PrimeIntellect-ai/prime-rl/blob/73ccffe11563570861a651098e64ae8c311505b6/src/prime_rl/inference/vllm/server.py#L105-L113)

diff_hunk:
@@ -233,15 +322,16 @@ def server(config: InferenceConfig, vllm_args: list[str]):
     from vllm.entrypoints.cli.serve import run_headless, run_multi_api_server
     from vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server import run_server
 
-    if config.model.tool_call_parser is not None:
-        logger.info(f"Using tool_call_parser='{config.model.tool_call_parser}' for model '{config.model.name}'")
-
     parser = FlexibleArgumentParser(description="vLLM OpenAI-Compatible RESTful API server.")
     parser = make_arg_parser(parser)
     args = parser.parse_args(args=vllm_args, namespace=config.to_vllm())
     assert args is not None
     validate_parsed_serve_args(args)
 
+    args.tool_call_parser, args.enable_auto_tool_choice = resolve_tool_call_parser(args.model, args.tool_call_parser)
+    if args.tool_call_parser is not None:
+        logger.info(f"Using tool_call_parser='{args.tool_call_parser}' for model '{args.model}'")
body: ### User auto-tool-choice flag gets overridden **Medium Severity** `server()` overwrites `args.enable_auto_tool_choice` with `tool_call_parser is not None`, which can negate an explicit `--enable-auto-tool-choice` / `model.enable_auto_tool_choice=true` when `tool_call_parser` is intentionally `None`. This can cause unexpected disabling of auto tool choice even though the user explicitly enabled it.

body:
### Changelog missing for config behavior change **Medium Severity** The semantics of `inference.model.tool_call_parser` changed (auto-detection moved and now requires `"auto"`), but there is no accompanying `CHANGELOG.md` entry describing the new configuration usage pattern.
Additional Locations (1) - [`src/prime_rl/inference/vllm/server.py#L105-L113`](https://github.com/PrimeIntellect-ai/prime-rl/blob/73ccffe11563570861a651098e64ae8c311505b6/src/prime_rl/inference/vllm/server.py#L105-L113)
